rulings.Case Title: CLIFFORD COOK VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, May 27, 2009, line 4, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion for Summary Judgment is denied. Failure to shift burden. No declaration from decision maker regarding why plaintiff disciplined. Also, Triable Issue of Fact of pretext because of disparate treatment. =(302/CWW/PB)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM ROUSE VS. CHEVRON CORP. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, May 27, 2009, line 5, DEFENDANT BRAD CULKIN, DR., RICHARD JOHNSON, GREG JOHNSON, and, NEW LOGIC RESEARCH/INTERNATIONAL DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to plead facts that demonstrate that the statute of limitations has not run. Fails to state cause of action because claims and defendants present in this case are indentical to those presented in case number 324029 filed in this Court December 2001, which has been dismissed with prejudice. No reasonable possibility that plaintiff can state a cause of action. =(302/CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: VIRGINIA BALDOVIESO VS. KEN WOO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Reonsideration Of Order Sustaining Demurrer Without Leave To Amend Or In The Alternative Relief Pursuant To 473
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, May 27, 2009, line 6, PLAINTIFF VIRGINIA BALDOVIESO Motion For Reonsideration Of Order Sustaining Demurrer Without Leave To Amend Or In The Alternative Relief Pursuant To 473. Motion is denied. No new law or facts raised in reconsideration motion. No relief warranted under CCP 473. =(302/CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: THOMPSON PACIFIC CORPORATION VS. JAMESTOWN EQUITY PARTNERS, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, May 27, 2009, line 8, DEFENDANT JAMESTOWN EQUITY PARTNERS, LLC MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-08-478031, CGC-08-478090, CGC-08-478200, CGC-08-478435, CGC-08-478599, CGC-08-478730, CGC-08-478951, CGC-08-479295, CGC-08-479833, CGC-08-479914, CGC-08-480337, CGC-08-480378, CGC-08-480468, CGC-08-480836, CGC-08-481903, CGC-08-482712 WITH CASE CGC-08-474888. rulings.Case Title: PAMELA DALE VS. THE SAN FRANCISCO OPERA ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, May 27, 2009, line 9, DEFENDANT THE FRANCISCO OPERA ASSOCIATION, ROBERT BASSINE, and, DAVID GOCKLEY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant shifts the burden and plaintiff fails to raise a triable issue of material fact. Plaintiff fails to establish the existance of a valid contract. The unjust enrichment and negligent misrepresentation claims are derivative of plaintiff's breach of contract claim. =(302/CWW/ARR)

rulings.Case Title: ALEX D. PATEK VS. RECONSTRUCT COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees;
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, May 27, 2009, line 10, DEFENDANT MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEM, INC. Motion For Attorney's Fees. rulings.Case Title: MARK FOUNTAIN VS. CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST, A CALIFORNIA BUSINESS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motio To Strike Portions Of Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, May 27, 2009, line 12, DEFENDANT CATHOLIC HEALTH WEST, Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint. Objection to defendant's supplemental request for judicial notice is overruled. Motion to strike is granted. Plaintiff to comply with Code of Civil Procedure section 425.14. =(302/CWW/PB)

rulings.Case Title: MARK FOUNTAIN VS. CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST, A CALIFORNIA BUSINESS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, May 27, 2009, line 12, DEFENDANT CATHOLIC HEALTH WEST, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer is overruled in part, and sustained in part. Demurrer is sustained as to the 14th Cause of Action for defamation, only, with ten days leave to amend. Plaintiff to specify whether pleading slander or liable. Plaintiff to plead the injurious statements with particularity, and set them out verbatim. Demurrer is overruled as to the reamininng causes of action. =(302/CWW/PB)

rulings.Case Title: KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN INC A CORPORATION VS. DEMAKAS PLUMBING & HEALTH INC A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, May 27, 2009, line 13, DEFENDANT DEMAKAS PLUMBING & HEATING, INC DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer is overruled; Motion to Strike is denied. Ten days leave to answer. =(302/CWW/PB)

rulings.Case Title: CONSOLIDATED REALTY SERVICES VS. GENRIETTA LERNER et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, May 27, 2009, line 14, DEFENDANT GENRIETTA LERNER MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion is denied. Failure to shift burden of proof. Defendant doesn't show rent plaintiff seeks is over one year old, and doesn't cite authority that landlord cannot appply payments to previous debts. =(302/CWW/PB)
